description: Static public essay index for paulgraham.com.

novel_features.name: Latest Essays
novel_features.description: Lists the newest essays from the canonical paulgraham.com/articles.html index without requiring an official API or feed.

novel_features.name: Essay Search
novel_features.description: Searches essay titles and slugs, with an optional full-text mode that fetches and scans linked essay pages.

novel_features.name: Read Essay
novel_features.description: Fetches a specific essay by slug, URL, title, or title substring and returns extracted readable text with word count and excerpt metadata.

novel_features.name: Essay Link Extractor
novel_features.description: Extracts links from an essay page so agents can inspect citations, footnotes, and outbound references.

novel_features.name: Random Essay
novel_features.description: Picks a random essay from the live index, with deterministic seeding for reproducible agent workflows.
